steps.title: Find the novel contrast
steps.content: The student wants a difference between the two novels, not just a fact they share. The notes say Julie, or The New Heloise is mostly letters, while Absolutely Normal Chaos is mostly journal entries during summer vacation by a student.

steps.title: Name both document forms
steps.content: A gives a similarity, C discusses only one of the novels by name, and D says the novels show variety without specifying the difference between them. The option that contrasts letters with journal entries uses the notes most effectively. The answer is B.
